verification.summary: mcp_surfaces is empty and site-local task lifecycle MCP remains listed as missing capability.
Package descriptors define site_task_lifecycle names, but admitted Narada MCP facade surfaces do not expose them as live tools.

blocker: Operator approval was relayed, but Narada proper still lacks admitted concrete live execution carriers/surfaces, especially a live MCP registration/transport for site_task_lifecycle tools.
why_partial_execution_refused: The requested scope requires all four live admissions. Running initializer or DB mutation without admitted live MCP registration would create live state while terminal setup remains unclaimable.
exact_admissions_needed: receiving Site write root plus exact initializer carrier/tool
concrete adapter implementation outside @narada2/site-task-lifecycle plus dependency/driver owner
DB mutation carrier through the admitted adapter with readback/idempotency/rollback evidence
Narada proper live MCP registration tool/transport exposing site_task_lifecycle tools and constrained by adapter authority
rollback_notes: Remove this audit entry and the corresponding ledger entries if superseded by a later explicit admission that names concrete live carriers/surfaces. No package files, runtime registrations, SQLite DBs, or source Site state were changed.
